# Uv Vis Spectrum

**Summary**: A technique used to measure the concentration of substances by observing their absorption of light in the ultraviolet and visible ranges.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016]] used uv-vis-spectroscopy to determine biomass concentration through optical density measurements.
